tagline: On July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC, Genie products will move to a pay as you go pricing model.
what_it_does: On July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC, Genie products will move to a pay as you go pricing model. Each user receives 150 DBUs of free LLM usage every month, equivalent to about $10.50 in the US East region. Usage beyond the free allowance is billed in DBUs.
why_it_matters: Account admins can use budgets to set cost controls.
plain_summary: On July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC, Genie products will move to a pay as you go pricing model. Each user receives 150 DBUs of free LLM usage every month, equivalent to about $10.50 in the US East region.
key_takeaway: On July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC, Genie products will move to a pay as you go pricing model.
